programme.title: NFL Football
programme.desc: Relive Green Bay's thrilling 27-23 win over Detroit, punctuated by an unforgettable Hail Mary to give them the lead on the game's final play.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Watch the Arizona Cardinals' thrilling last-second win over the Buffalo Bills in Week 10 of the 2020 season.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The Giants and Cowboys duel in an NFC East classic showdown that features six lead changes in the fourth quarter and overtime as Russell Wilson and Malik Nabers look to outshine Dak Prescott and CeeDee Lamb.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen & Co. overcome New York Jets quarterback Aaron Rodgers' Hail Mary to beat the Jets 23-20 on Monday Night Football.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: In one of the most chaotic endings in NFL history, the Seattle Seahawks stun the Green Bay Packers with rookie Russell Wilson's last second Hail Mary touchdown to WR Golden Tate.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Kenneth Walker III leads the Seattle Seahawks to a comeback win, rushing for 84 of his 103 yards in the second half as they defeat the Denver Broncos 26-20. Seahawks head coach Mike Macdonald secures his first victory as head coach.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Saquon Barkley shines in a 28-23 win vs. Jacksonville Jaguars as he hurdles defenders on his way to 199 total yards and two touchdowns.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Despite a four-interception day from Sam Darnold, the Seahawks nearly take down the Los Angeles Rams in an NFC West battle for the division lead that ends in a 21–19 Rams' victory.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Despite a four-interception day from Sam Darnold, the Seahawks nearly take down the Los Angeles Rams in an NFC West battle for the division lead that ends in a 21–19 Rams' victory.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Los Angeles Chargers kicker Cameron Dicker had a go-ahead 54-yard field goal, one of his five in the game, and Tony Jefferson intercepted Jalen Hurts at the 1-yard line in overtime of a messy 22-19 victory over the Philadelphia Eagles.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jake Browning threw for 354 yards and a touchdown in his second start - much better than the four-sack, two-turnover performance a week earlier - and the Cincinnati Bengals stunned the Jacksonville Jaguars 34-31 in overtime Monday night.
